message: I'm just so tired all the time, work has been brutal this week.
Couldn't sleep again last night. My brain just kept replaying the meeting.
Sometimes I wish I just didn't have to wake up tomorrow.
I've been crying for hours and I can't stop. I feel so hopeless.
I've decided how I'm going to end it. I have the pills ready.
My partner has been hitting me again. I'm scared to go home tonight.
Honestly I feel pretty good today, work went well!
I keep thinking about hurting myself but I never actually would.
Anxiety has been through the roof. Heart racing, can't breathe.
I tried to take my own life last night. I'm at home now, alone.
